body:
Fixes #561

## Summary
- Pass the resolved release commit SHA/version from `auto-release` and `manual-release` to the Pages deployment job.
- Make GitHub Pages checkout, artifact stamping, and the live Pages E2E wait use the same selected release SHA.
- Replace direct `cargo install rust-script` CI steps with a retrying `scripts/install-rust-script.sh` wrapper after the PR run reproduced a transient crates.io HTTP/2 install failure.
- Add workflow regression coverage plus a case-study folder with downloaded CI logs, live version evidence, screenshot, and template comparison data.

## Root Cause
The reported CI/CD run deployed Pages from the pre-release workflow SHA `0ff0455...`, where `Cargo.toml` still advertised `0.217.0`. The `auto-release` job later created the child release commit/tag for `v0.218.0`, but Pages had already stamped and uploaded the older version. The live Pages E2E check waited for the pre-release SHA too, so it passed while proving the stale deployment was live.

A follow-up PR run (`28118275692`) also exposed an unrelated CI/CD reliability problem: `Detect Changes` failed during `cargo install rust-script` because crates.io returned `[16] Error in the HTTP2 framing layer` while downloading `libc`. The neighboring version-check job installed the same tool successfully, so this PR now retries that install path.

## Reproduction
- `docs/case-studies/issue-561/raw-data/repro-before-workflow-test.log` shows `ci_cd::workflow_release::demo_deploy_waits_for_release_ref_before_pages_upload` failing before the fix because `auto-release` did not expose `outputs.pages_sha`.
- The same focused test passes after the workflow change: `docs/case-studies/issue-561/raw-data/repro-after-focused-workflow-test.log`.
- `docs/case-studies/issue-561/raw-data/ci-cd-pipeline-28118275692.log` preserves the transient rust-script install failure that motivated the retry wrapper.

## Evidence
- Case study: `docs/case-studies/issue-561/README.md`
- User-reported stale web app screenshot:

![Issue 561 stale web app version](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-561-4a4fbf7162b8/docs/case-studies/issue-561/screenshots/web-app-version.png?raw=true)

## Template Comparison
I copied workflow/file-tree snapshots for the JS, Rust, Python, and C# templates into `docs/case-studies/issue-561/template-comparison/`. No matching upstream template defect was found, so I did not open template issues.

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `bash -n scripts/install-rust-script.sh`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (passed with existing warning-band files only)
- `cargo test ci_cd --all-features`
- `cargo test --all-features` (1,145 passed, 1 ignored)
- `git diff --check`

commits.messageBody:
Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/561

commits.messageHeadline: fix: deploy pages from release commit

title: fix: deploy Pages from the release commit
